subcodes.first_line: Mighty Tablets have been revealed and sent down from the Most Holy Court, specifically destined for your honor. Under all conditions remain vigilant in the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الواح منیعه از ساحت اقدس مخصوص آنجناب نازل و ارسال شد در جمیع احوال مراقب امر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @predictions and prophecies, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
